# Collaboration Agreement: Academic Software Infrastructure

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Disclaimer**: Templates require legal and Institutional Review Board (IRB) review at your institution. AnnealMusic provides drafts as starting points, not legal advice.

---

This agreement outlines the operational and legal boundaries between the **Principal Investigator's (PI) Institution** and **AnnealMusic** (hereinafter referred to as the "Software Provider") concerning the use of the AnnealMusic platform for research and clinical studies.

---

## 1. Scope of the Software

AnnealMusic is provided strictly as **software infrastructure** to facilitate dynamic, real-time auditory synthesis, data sonification, and clinical-grade experiment orchestration. The Software Provider is not a research partner, co-investigator, or collaborator on any study initiated by the PI's institution, unless a separate, explicit sponsored contract is executed.

---

## 2. Zero-Strings IP & Data Ownership

- **100% Institution Ownership**: The PI's institution retains full, exclusive, and undivided ownership of all intellectual property, data streams, participant logs, biometric telemetry, survey responses, and analysis scripts generated during the study.
- **No Claims by Software Provider**: The Software Provider claims no rights, titles, interests, or licenses in the data or results generated by the PI's institution using the software.

---

## 3. Co-Authorship & Academic Integrity

- **No Default Co-Authorship**: The creators, developers, and maintainers of AnnealMusic do not assert co-authorship claims on academic papers, conference submissions, or presentations utilizing the software.
- **Citation Standard**: The standard of academic integrity and citation is sufficient. The PI's institution agrees to cite the software version and Zenodo DOI in all resulting publications, as detailed in the _AnnealMusic Citation Guide_.

---

## 4. Privacy & Zero-Egress Posture

- **Zero Central Storage**: By default, participant data is processed locally in-browser and transmitted directly to the PI's designated endpoint. The Software Provider does not host, process, index, or store any patient-level logs on its central servers.
- **Opt-in Hosted Storage**: If the PI explicitly opts into and purchases an enterprise hosted storage service, a separate Business Associate Agreement (BAA) will be executed to guarantee full HIPAA/GDPR compliance.

---

## 5. Warranties & Disclaimers

- **Provided "As-Is"**: The software is provided "as-is", without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
- **Research Use Only**: The software is scoped for scientific research and music cognition studies. It is not approved by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) as a diagnostic or therapeutic medical device.
- **Limitation of Liability**: In no event shall the Software Provider be liable for any claims, damages, or liabilities arising from participant exposure to auditory stimuli or hardware-level biofeedback tracking.
